overall.description: A slow first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city corridor opening to a panoramic balcony view. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, metal truss structures, and prominent signage, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow elevated corridor between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: slowly advancing through a narrow metal corridor with blue illuminated panels on both sides

entered.detail: dark metal support beams forming the corridor wall structure
vertical panels emitting cyan and blue light along the corridor walls
metal ceiling and support beams of the elevated walkway
faint glow of skyscraper windows visible through the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a slow forward movement through a narrow, enclosed metal corridor with illuminated cyan panels on both sides. The space is tight and industrial, with truss structures visible and a distant glow of city lights ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway transitioning from enclosed corridor to open balcony

events.description: walkway opens up from enclosed corridor to reveal the open sky and city skyline ahead
bright light source appears briefly on the right side, possibly a vehicle or aircraft passing by

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the confined space opens up to reveal a panoramic city view

entered.detail: dark night sky becoming visible as the corridor opens up
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The corridor gradually opens up to reveal a breathtaking view of the cyberpunk cityscape. The sky becomes visible overhead while the enclosing walls fall away. A brief flash of bright light illuminates the scene from the right at around 16 seconds.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony overlooking expansive cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: large red neon sign 'Fuyutsuki' becomes clearly visible on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the open balcony with the sprawling neon-lit city spread out below and ahead

entered.detail: large red neon sign with white text mounted on the building facade
tall building facades flanking the walkway on both sides

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an open elevated walkway with an expansive view of the neon-drenched cyberpunk city. The prominent red 'Fuyutsuki' neon sign becomes visible on the left building around the 50-second mark, dominating the foreground as the camera continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a claustrophobic industrial interior into a vast, neon-lit urban panorama. It begins within a narrow metal corridor flanked by glowing cyan panels and heavy truss structures, moving steadily toward a distant light. As the enclosing walls fall away, the space opens up to reveal a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape under an expansive sky, punctuated by a sudden flash of bright light from the right. The scene then shifts onto an elevated walkway, where the perspective widens to encompass the sprawling metropolis before a prominent red Fuyutsuki neon sign emerges on the left to dominate the foreground.
